list.name: Changes
list.comment: Created and implemented createHint() method. Using a for loop, goes through each secret word and checks if character is the same as guessed letter. Puts the appended characters to the variable hint.

task.summary: Added hangman resources to the resources directory.
Added packages for each responsibility and a main class for program run.
Created HangmanGame Interface that does the functions of playing a game like presenting intro, reading guess, or playing another game.
Created ClasspathResources class that is used to read the ASCII art and words from the text files.
Created Hangman class that implements HangmanGame interface. Added the methods with the own implementation still blank.
Created HangmanRenderer interface that disyaplays the current structure of the hangman. Changed acces modifiers fo dat fields and some methods in the Hangaman class.
Created AsciiArtRenderer class that implements the HangmanRenderer interface. It prints the correct ASCII picture to the console for a number of guesses.
Created WordRepository interface that gets random word from the wor text file. Imported this onto the Hangman class as it uses this interface.

Created FileWordRepository class that implements the WordRepository interface. This class overall gets a random word from the text file. Resolved import problems regarding packages on ClasspathResources.
Created ClasspathWordRepository class that implements word repository.
Created GameStatistics enum that store and counts the total number of played games in a single run. Also changed the version to use the record for GameStatistics.
Added intro display in the intro method.
Made the constant variables final and static, initialized with a value, especially those that are used for the testing phase.
Created and implemented toString() method. Using a for loop, goes through each secret word and checks if character is the same as guessed letter. Puts the appended characters to the variable hint.
Created and implemented createHint() method. Using a for loop, goes through each secret word and checks if character is the same as guessed letter. Puts the appended characters to the variable hint.

MESSAGE.value: Added hangman resources to the resources directory.
Added packages for each responsibility and a main class for program run.
Created HangmanGame Interface that does the functions of playing a game like presenting intro, reading guess, or playing another game.
Created ClasspathResources class that is used to read the ASCII art and words from the text files.
Created Hangman class that implements HangmanGame interface. Added the methods with the own implementation still blank.
Created HangmanRenderer interface that disyaplays the current structure of the hangman. Changed acces modifiers fo dat fields and some methods in the Hangaman class.
Created AsciiArtRenderer class that implements the HangmanRenderer interface. It prints the correct ASCII picture to the console for a number of guesses.
Created WordRepository interface that gets random word from the wor text file. Imported this onto the Hangman class as it uses this interface.

Created FileWordRepository class that implements the WordRepository interface. This class overall gets a random word from the text file. Resolved import problems regarding packages on ClasspathResources.
Created ClasspathWordRepository class that implements word repository.
Created GameStatistics enum that store and counts the total number of played games in a single run. Also changed the version to use the record for GameStatistics.
Added intro display in the intro method.
Made the constant variables final and static, initialized with a value, especially those that are used for the testing phase.
Created and implemented toString() method. Using a for loop, goes through each secret word and checks if character is the same as guessed letter. Puts the appended characters to the variable hint.
Created and implemented createHint() method. Using a for loop, goes through each secret word and checks if character is the same as guessed letter. Puts the appended characters to the variable hint.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: Created and implemented createHint() method. Using a for loop, goes through each secret word and checks if character is the same as guessed letter. Puts the appended characters to the variable hint.
